title: Verify login fails with correct credentials but with leading/trailing spaces in password
description: Test that leading or trailing whitespace in the password field is treated as part of the password and causes login to fail.
preconditions: User account exists with email 'test@example.com' and password 'validPassword123'
User is on the login page

steps.description: 2. Enter ' validPassword123 ' into the password field

expected_result: An error message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed. User remains on the login page.
